title: Year of the Rebulds
wikitext:
[]: Year of the Rebulds             Quote Post by LucAAAs » Sat Dec 09, 2023 3:36 am (If the images don´t render, I left links to each image in order on the first reply.) While scrolling Reddit I found a post pointing out that, unlike most other Evangelion continuities, nowhere in NTE is the year of the events ocurring mentioned, only shown subtly in 3 scenes (that I am aware of), but with a very bizarre dating system. -Firstly in the scene where Gendo takes Shinji to visit Yui´s grave, the engraving aparrently states that the year is 2004 (like NGE), however, obscured partly by the flower bouquet, we can see two algarisms, one I cannot distinguish(maybe 1) and 0 written beforehand. Whether this is some weird date arrangement or implication that she somehow died in the year 102,004 I can´t say for certain, but plain 2004 seems fishy. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Year of the Rebulds             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Dec 18, 2023 12:11 pm Here's my topic about dates from a year and a half ago: Have we found all the dates in the Rebuilds? In it, we additionally cover some school and apartment calendar screenshots. I don't think we discussed looping or anima in there, though! LucAAAs wrote: Image links if you guys also cant see them here: https://imgbox.com/4bt9LQgD https://imgbox.com/Pb9eEsJc https://imgbox.com/ZkaeevJ2 https://imgbox.com/MGZFaERd I´ve tried 4 different image hosting sites and they still wont render for me, if anyone can help me out i´d really appreciate as I am kind of a noob in bbcode lol.

Article: Year of the Rebulds
[]: Year of the Rebulds             Quote Post by LucAAAs » Sat Dec 09, 2023 3:36 am (If the images don´t render, I left links to each image in order on the first reply.) While scrolling Reddit I found a post pointing out that, unlike most other Evangelion continuities, nowhere in NTE is the year of the events ocurring mentioned, only shown subtly in 3 scenes (that I am aware of), but with a very bizarre dating system. -Firstly in the scene where Gendo takes Shinji to visit Yui´s grave, the engraving aparrently states that the year is 2004 (like NGE), however, obscured partly by the flower bouquet, we can see two algarisms, one I cannot distinguish(maybe 1) and 0 written beforehand. Whether this is some weird date arrangement or implication that she somehow died in the year 102,004 I can´t say for certain, but plain 2004 seems fishy. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Year of the Rebulds             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Dec 18, 2023 12:11 pm Here's my topic about dates from a year and a half ago: Have we found all the dates in the Rebuilds? In it, we additionally cover some school and apartment calendar screenshots. I don't think we discussed looping or anima in there, though!
